holdings.infoBox: EYES is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Palantir Technologies stock at 12.82%, Datadog at 8.68%, Motorola Solutions at 6.65%, Axon Enterprise at 5.45%, and Teledyne Technologies at 4.93%.

overview.description: The Corgi Data & Surveillance ETF (EYES) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation through a portfolio of companiestiedtothe development and deployment of technologies tied to surveillance and data usage. EYES was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
